name: inject_chat_message
desc: Type and send a message in a chat WebView2. Optionally animates typing character-by-character. Use for agent handoff: open specialist window, then inject continuation prompt.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The text to type and send.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Which WebView2 to target: Main, DrawingExporter, ParameterEditor. Default: Main.

parameters.name: typing_animation
parameters.description: Set to 'true' for character-by-character typing. Default: false (instant).
